title: diplazium lepidorachis
intro: Diplazium lepidorachis, also known as the Leptolepidium fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Athyriaceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in Southeast Asia, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Diplazium lepidorachis are said to include reducing fever, relieving joint pain and inflammation, and supporting respiratory health, among others. In traditional herbal preparations, the leaves of Diplazium lepidorachis are often dried and made into tea, or used in infusions and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
